name: Safety Risk Framing appraisal for tad-cognition-healthy-adults bundle
summary: Accepted for this bounded insufficient-evidence cognition baseline. The ETLAS-2 adverse-event signal is visible, the vardenafil abstract adverse effects remain low-confidence adjacent safety context, and the claim explicitly says a dedicated safety baseline is needed before broad off-label benefit summaries. Current DailyMed labeling boundaries were checked for the appraisal and support keeping contraindications and hypotension/interactions near any later benefit-oriented claim.

findings.claim_or_issue: The cognition bundle does not itself constitute a complete tadalafil safety review.
findings.why_it_matters: Current labeling includes contraindications and interaction risks that must be near any off-label benefit claim.
findings.recommended_action: Complete the safety/interactions baseline before publishing broad benefit-oriented tadalafil summaries.
